title: Need for Speed: Nitro
short_description: Arcade-style NFS on Nintendo DS — licensed cars, upgrades, and street racing with bold style.
description: Unleash your inner speed demon with Need for Speed Nitro for the Nintendo DS. This high-energy racing game delivers fast-paced, arcade-style action, letting you dominate the streets with style and speed. Choose from a wide selection of licensed cars from top manufacturers and customize them with an array of performance upgrades and visual modifications to create your ultimate racing machine.
